synopsis: [El-errata] ELBA-2025-23339 Oracle Linux 9 lvm2 bug fix and enhancement update
overview: Oracle Linux Bug Fix Advisory ELBA-2025-23339
description:
[2.03.32-2.el9_7.1]
- Add message when activating RAID volumes with snapshots.
full_text:
